recipe.title: Spinach & feta filo pie
recipe.description: A flaky, crispy, crunchy, oozy, cheesy vegetarian pie recipe from Jamie Oliver. It's packed with spinach, too! A brilliant recipe for a weekend lunch or dinner party.

steps.descr: Toast the pine nuts in a large ovenproof frying pan over...
steps.instructions: Toast the pine nuts in a large ovenproof frying pan over a medium heat for 1 to 2 minutes, or until golden and smelling fantastic, tossing occasionally.

on_enter.say: Toast the pine nuts in a large ovenproof frying pan over a medium heat for 1 to 2 minutes, or until golden and smelling fantastic, tossing occasionally.

steps.descr: Crack the eggs into a large mixing bowl, crumble in the...
steps.instructions: Crack the eggs into a large mixing bowl, crumble in the feta, then grate in the Cheddar. Season with a pinch of black pepper and a couple of pinches of dried oregano.

on_enter.say: Crack the eggs into a large mixing bowl, crumble in the feta, then grate in the Cheddar. Season with a pinch of black pepper and a couple of pinches of dried oregano.

steps.descr: Finely grate in the lemon zest, drizzle in a little oil,...
steps.instructions: Finely grate in the lemon zest, drizzle in a little oil, then toss in the toasted pine nuts. Mix well.

on_enter.say: Finely grate in the lemon zest, drizzle in a little oil, then toss in the toasted pine nuts. Mix well.

steps.descr: Melt the butter in the frying pan over a medium heat...
steps.instructions: Melt the butter in the frying pan over a medium heat with a drizzle of oil, add half the spinach, stirring until wilted, then when there’s space, add the remaining spinach, stirring regularly until wilted.

on_enter.say: Melt the butter in the frying pan over a medium heat with a drizzle of oil, add half the spinach, stirring until wilted, then when there’s space, add the remaining spinach, stirring regularly until wilted.

steps.descr: Lay a 50cm strip of greaseproof paper out on a clean...
steps.instructions: Lay a 50cm strip of greaseproof paper out on a clean work surface, rub lightly with oil and scrunch up, then flatten out again.

on_enter.say: Lay a 50cm strip of greaseproof paper out on a clean work surface, rub lightly with oil and scrunch up, then flatten out again.

steps.descr: Arrange 4 sheets of filo in a large rectangle on the...
steps.instructions: Arrange 4 sheets of filo in a large rectangle on the greaseproof paper, overlapping at the edges, so that it’s almost covering the greaseproof.

on_enter.say: Arrange 4 sheets of filo in a large rectangle on the greaseproof paper, overlapping at the edges, so that it’s almost covering the greaseproof.

steps.descr: Rub the filo with a little oil, sprinkle with sea salt,...
steps.instructions: Rub the filo with a little oil, sprinkle with sea salt, pepper and a pinch of cayenne pepper. Repeat until you have 3 layers.

on_enter.say: Rub the filo with a little oil, sprinkle with sea salt, pepper and a pinch of cayenne pepper. Repeat until you have 3 layers.

steps.descr: Stir the wilted spinach into the egg mixture, then grate...
steps.instructions: Stir the wilted spinach into the egg mixture, then grate in half the nutmeg and mix well.

on_enter.say: Stir the wilted spinach into the egg mixture, then grate in half the nutmeg and mix well.

steps.descr: Slide the greaseproof and filo into the empty frying...
steps.instructions: Slide the greaseproof and filo into the empty frying pan, so that the edges spill over, then push down into the sides of the pan.

on_enter.say: Slide the greaseproof and filo into the empty frying pan, so that the edges spill over, then push down into the sides of the pan.

steps.descr: Pour in the spinach mixture and spread out evenly, then...
steps.instructions: Pour in the spinach mixture and spread out evenly, then fold the filo up over the filling to cover.

on_enter.say: Pour in the spinach mixture and spread out evenly, then fold the filo up over the filling to cover.

steps.descr: Place the pan over a medium heat for 2 minutes, just to...
steps.instructions: Place the pan over a medium heat for 2 minutes, just to get the bottom cooking, then transfer to the top shelf of the oven for 18 to 20 minutes, or until golden and crisp. Delicious served with a fresh seasonal salad.

on_enter.say: Place the pan over a medium heat for 2 minutes, just to get the bottom cooking, then transfer to the top shelf of the oven for 18 to 20 minutes, or until golden and crisp. Delicious served with a fresh seasonal salad.
